productDisplayName: Nike Men's Ope Black Track Pant
description: CompositionBlack track pants made of 100% cotton, with a mildly elasticated broad waistband that has a drawstring below it, pockets on the sides and one at the back on the right with the Athletic Department badge, white strips running down the length of the legs and embroidered nike swoosh below left pocketFittingComfortWash care Machine wash cold inside out with like colours Use a mild detergent Do not bleach Line dry Warm iron Do not dry clean Stylish to the T, these black cotton track pants from nike are designed to keep you fresh and comfortable while you sweat it out at the gym or on the trail. The broad waistband sits snugly, and you can further customise the Fit using the drawstring. Team it with Nike Athletic Department tees and sports shoes for that smart, sporty look.
